excluded_spaces: vocabularies with fewer than three commitment-distinct primitives
vocabularies outside the ten frozen AVC-001 candidates

decision_rule.global_minimality_established: every lower-cost admissible vocabulary in the stated global search domain is defeated or Pareto-inferior with no unresolved preservation judgments
decision_rule.global_minimality_falsified: at least one lower-cost admissible vocabulary preserves all required commitments and Pareto-dominates or equals FAR
